case_title: GREEN, JEROME "JERRY" J. JR vs. FOG CITY PARKING et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GREEN, JEROME "JERRY" J. JR AS TO DEFENDANT FOG CITY PARKING CEDAR TERRACE, INC
